'''Fere''', sometimes known as '''Feree''', was the [[Fere (species)|Fere]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]].

The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of Fere was famed for its [[Fere shipyards|shipyards]], and produced some of the most luxurious [[Starship/Legends|starships]] of the age. In about [[192 BBY]], the Fere populace and culture were still stable however the species later died out due to a planet-wide plague. The plague was brought to the planet by off-world traveler's searching for somewhere to hide during a war.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]'' {{Ab|The Courtship of Princess Leia (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
